name: driver-manager-db
description: Cloudflare Worker API for SiteOps with D1 database

scripts.deploy: npm run security:verify-deploy && npm run dashboard:sync-assets && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:check: npm run test:web && npm run security:verify-deploy
scripts.deploy:full: npm run test:web && npm run d1:migrate:remote && npm run deploy
scripts.test:dashboard: npm run dashboard:sync-assets && npm run test:dashboard:raw
scripts.test:worker:raw: node --test tests_js/worker.contract.test.mjs tests_js/worker/incidents.service.test.mjs tests_js/worker/pagination.test.mjs tests_js/worker/http.test.mjs tests_js/worker/auth-routes.test.mjs tests_js/worker/auth-security.test.mjs tests_js/worker/auth-session.test.mjs tests_js/worker/auth-legacy.test.mjs tests_js/worker/auth-users.test.mjs tests_js/worker/routes.test.mjs tests_js/worker/conformities.test.mjs
scripts.test:worker: npm run dashboard:sync-assets && npm run test:worker:raw
scripts.e2e:db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply driver-manager-db --local --persist-to .wrangler/state/e2e
scripts.e2e:prepare: npm run e2e:state:reset && npm run dashboard:sync-assets && npm run e2e:db:migrate
scripts.test:web: npm run dashboard:sync-assets && npm run test:dashboard:raw && npm run test:worker:raw
